title: boerlagiodendron teysmannii
intro: Boerlagiodendron teysmannii, also known as the Burmese ironwood or Yang tree, is a large tree species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boerlagiodendron teysmannii include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
